since_last: 57% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +5.69%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 57% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.03% · BTC +0.12% · Gold +1.33% · Nasdaq100 -0.68%. 57% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +5.69%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +5.69%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -3.72%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: NOW is the standout at +9.18%
cards.body: Leaders: NOW +9.18%, DV +8.49%, WDAY +8.27%, APP +7.64%, PUBM +7.25%. Laggards: TER -7.56%, NXPI -6.68%, HPE -6.39%, VRT -6.11%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.30% at $152.54
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.30% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
